x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces DOF's open reference data (property valuation, exemptions, tax-charge balances, ACRIS documents, parking violations) and adds pay_parking_ticket — the net-new write workflow locked today inside the legacy CityPay app.

server.name: io.nyc.dof
server.title: NYC Department of Finance (DOF)
server.description: Agent-native access to the NYC Department of Finance — property valuation & assessment, exemptions/abatements, property tax-charge balances, the ACRIS recorded-document register (deeds, mortgages, parties, legals), and parking/camera violations from NYC Open Data, plus the net-new ability to pay a parking ticket that today lives only in the legacy CityPay app.
server.instructions: Use find_property_valuations / get_property_valuation to look up a parcel's assessment by borough, tax class, or Borough-Block-Lot (BBL). find_property_exemptions covers STAR/SCHE/J-51/421-a and other benefits; get_property_tax_bill returns a parcel's outstanding charges. find_acris_documents / get_acris_document search recorded real-property documents (deeds, mortgages) and return their parties and affected lots. find_parking_violations / get_parking_violation look up a summons by plate or summons number and return its live balance. pay_parking_ticket (net-new) submits a payment against a summons; it mutates state and moves money — confirm the summons number and amount with the user, accept only a tokenized payment instrument (PayPal/Braintree), and never handle raw card or bank numbers.

tools.name: find_property_valuations
tools.title: Find Property Valuations
tools.description: Search DOF property valuation & assessment records by borough, tax class, building class, year, or free text.

tools.name: get_property_valuation
tools.title: Get Property Valuation
tools.description: Fetch a parcel's valuation & assessment (market/assessed values, lot dimensions, tax class) by Borough-Block-Lot (BBL).

tools.name: find_property_exemptions
tools.title: Find Property Exemptions
tools.description: Search property tax exemptions & abatements (STAR, SCHE, J-51, 421-a, ICIP) by borough, exemption code/name, or year.

tools.name: get_property_tax_bill
tools.title: Get Property Tax Bill
tools.description: Return the outstanding tax-charge balance (liability, interest, balance due) for a parcel by Borough-Block-Lot (BBL) and tax year.

tools.name: find_acris_documents
tools.title: Find ACRIS Documents
tools.description: Search recorded real-property documents (deeds, mortgages, satisfactions) by BBL, borough, document type, CRFN, or recording date range.

tools.name: get_acris_document
tools.title: Get ACRIS Document
tools.description: Fetch a recorded ACRIS document with its parties (grantor/grantee) and affected legal lots by document id.

tools.name: find_parking_violations
tools.title: Find Parking Violations
tools.description: Search parking & camera violations by plate, plate state, status, issuing agency, or violation code — returns the live balance for each summons.

tools.name: get_parking_violation
tools.title: Get Parking Violation
tools.description: Fetch a parking/camera violation and its outstanding balance by summons number.

tools.name: pay_parking_ticket
tools.title: Pay a Parking Ticket
tools.description: Submit a payment against a parking/camera violation summons (report and settle a ticket). NET-NEW workflow with no public API today — it lives only in the CityPay web app (a836-citypay.nyc.gov) or by mail. Mutates state and moves money — confirm the summons number and amount first, accept only a tokenized instrument (PayPal/Braintree), and never handle raw card or bank numbers.
